description_long: This is a compact, handheld two-way radio with a rugged, dark green and black plastic casing. The front features a small monochrome LCD display showing channel and battery information, surrounded by several physical buttons for menu navigation, power, and channel selection. The top of the device has a prominent cylindrical antenna for signal transmission and reception. The sides are contoured for grip, with one side showing a push-to-talk button and the other side a textured grip area. The back is mostly flat with a subtle logo and a battery compartment cover. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for outdoor or urban communication needs.
description: A rugged, handheld two-way radio with a small LCD display, physical buttons, and a prominent antenna, finished in dark green and black plastic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the LCD display, control buttons, speaker grille, and antenna.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical antenna and a textured grip area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the battery compartment cover and a subtle logo.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the push-to-talk button and additional grip texture.
